_comment: Starter cement additive lookup table. Expand this in Step 6 with real industry data (e.g., Halliburton/Schlumberger technical references). Temperatures in Celsius (BHT = Bottom Hole Temperature).

additives.function: Accelerate setting time in low-temperature shallow wells

additives.additive: Standard Class G Cement (no retarder needed)
additives.function: Normal setting for moderate depth/temperature wells
Extend pump time in deeper, hotter wells
Prevent flash-set in high temperature/high pressure wells
